data.title: Seized tanker near Venezuela to impact oil smuggling operations; struggle expected despite the intervention.
data.description: The recent seizure of a vessel by the U.S. near Venezuela is expected to put pressure on the country’s government. However, it may not have a significant impact on the operation of tankers clandestinely transporting oil from countries under sanctions.

Russia's Slavneft-Yanos oil refinery suspended output - sources.
Ukrainian drones hit primary crude distillation unit loading rack at Russia's Slavneft-Yanos oil refinery in Yaroslavl, according industry sources.

data.title: UK GDP unexpectedly shrinks by 0.1% in October, marking 4 months without growth. Services declined by 0.3%, construction by 0.6%, production grew by 1.1%. Car manufacturing hit by cyber-attack, with a 17.7% fall. Chancellor's budget speculation seen as drag on economic activity, analysts forecasted 0.1% growth. Services sector has shown no growth since March 2025. Policymakers face challenge in reviving GDP growth after leading in G7 earlier.
data.description: The UK's real GDP unexpectedly contracted by 0.1% in October, marking the fourth consecutive month without growth before the autumn budget. Services fell by 0.3% and construction by 0.6%, with production growing by 1.1%. On a rolling three-month basis, GDP contracted by 0.1% in October, with a 17.7% decline in motor vehicle production due to a cyber-attack on Jaguar Land Rover. The economy showed caution, with manufacturing, construction, and other sectors affected by budget speculation. Construction output fell by 0.3% for the three months to October, while services showed no growth. Policymakers are struggling after leading G7 growth in the first half of the year.

data.title: Duke Energy offers tips to save energy and money ahead of plunging temperatures next week in Charlotte, N.C.
data.description: Residents in Charlotte, N.C. can now access customer tools and advice to effectively control their energy usage and expenses as temperatures dip below average. Duke Energy has prepared for the upcoming frigid weather forecast next week and is dedicated to assisting customers in saving energy and reducing costs. This initiative is crucial as the region prepares to endure temperatures that are predicted to be significantly colder than usual.

data.title: Business of Design Week 2025 ends with 15,000+ attendees from Hong Kong and Italy, focusing on cross-disciplinary innovation. Switzerland to be partner country next year.
data.description: A recent three-day summit in Hong Kong SAR and Italy brought together more than 15,000 participants to promote cross-disciplinary innovation driven by curiosity. The event highlighted Switzerland as the partner country for the upcoming year. The Business of Design Week (BODW) 2025 Summit showcased a strong focus on fostering collaboration and creativity among a diverse group of attendees.

data.title: Subsea 7 S.A. released 2026 financial calendar, ticker: SUBC on Oslo Børs, ADR: SUBCY - Dec 12, 2025.
data.description: Luxembourg, December 12, 2025 - Subsea 7 S.A. revealed its financial schedule for the year 2026. The company, listed as SUBC on the Oslo Stock Exchange and SUBCY as ADR, shared this information with stakeholders and the public.

data.title: Global market for PFAS-Free EV battery fire protection coatings to reach $7.7 billion by 2036, a crucial change for electric vehicle safety.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware on December 12, 2025, it has been observed that there is a significant shift occurring in the automotive supply chain due to the increasing popularity of electric mobility worldwide. An essential safety concern related to battery fire protection, particularly the absence of PFAS, is becoming a key focus. Recent data highlights that there is a global effort towards implementing safer practices, with a growing emphasis on eliminating PFAS from battery fire protection measures. This change is not solely driven by regulatory obligations but also by the increasing demand for safer electric vehicle technology.

data.title: Whataburger offers 12 Days of Daily Deals for Rewards Members in the Whataburger App this holiday season.
data.description: Starting on December 12, 2025, Whataburger® Rewards Members will have the opportunity to enjoy a special daily deal exclusively through the Whataburger App. This promotion aims to bring joy and satisfaction to customers during the holiday season in San Antonio.

data.title: Alkami launches Foundry hub on alkami.com for technology builders, providing visibility into platform, engineering practices, and partner ecosystem. (Characters: 127)
data.description: Alkami Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALKT) based in PLANO, Texas, announced on December 12, 2025, the launch of a new central resource on alkami.com. This platform aims to provide builders with enhanced insights into Alkami's Platform, engineering practices, and partner ecosystem. ALKT is a leading digital sales and service platform provider.

data.title: 2025-2026 holiday season explores new cheese trends with European touch by Granlatte, largest Italian milk coop.
data.description: In New York on December 12, 2025, the upcoming holiday season of 2025-2026 presents a unique opportunity to delve into fresh cheeseboard trends with a European flair. Granlatte, Italy's largest milk producers' cooperative, is spearheading the European Cheese Quality campaign, aiming to showcase a diverse range of cheeses to consumers. As part of this initiative, Granlatte will highlight premium European cheeses renowned for their taste and quality. The campaign aims to introduce American consumers to a wide variety of European cheese options and educate them on the distinct flavors and textures. Overall, the campaign aims to reach a broad audience of cheese enthusiasts and increase awareness of European cheese varieties in the United States.

data.title: Andersen Corp. distributed $52.2M in profit sharing and $5M in community support in 2025. #Bayport #AndersenCorporation
data.description: Andersen Corporation, based in Bayport, Minnesota, revealed on December 12, 2025, that it has disbursed over $52.2 million in profit sharing to qualifying employees for the year. Andersen, recognized as the top brand of windows and doors in the United States, highlighted its commitment to rewarding its workforce.
